violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. An employee certified in an approved food safety management course must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The door to the outside, located at the store entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser fan guard of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

The floor in several areas is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview of owner/operator, floor is scheduled to be done this summer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (veggie slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door is scheduled to be repaired this Saturday. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The floor in several areas of the facility is in poor repair. In addition, the coving around the walk-in coolers has come off and must be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen area is not covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles are missing and must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (veggie slicers, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue, food, and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicers cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Ice machine turned off and emptied to be cleaned and sanitized. Bagged ice is to be used until ice machine has been effectively cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Soup and meatballs observed held at 130 - 131 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were properly reheated and returned to hot hold unit. Temperatures are to be carefully monitored. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the storage closet. No foods/food equipment observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment has active pest control. Areas of droppings are to be thoroughly cleaned to check for new activity. Pest control is to be contacted and increase service as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floor in several areas of the facility is in poor repair. In addition, the coving around the walk-in coolers has come off and must be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen area is not covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles are missing and must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of the veggie slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed with black/brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the corner of the storage room (under the stairs). No foods observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. This area is to be thoroughly cleaned to monitor for new activity. Pest control is to be notified and increase service as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The floor in several areas of the facility is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
